ksa_text: Design, build, and maintain automated data ingestion pipelines from source systems to the data platform, including schema mapping, transformation logic, error handling, and data quality validation at ingestion points.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: task maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("pipelines?", "data ingest", "transformation logic"). STRM composite score is strong (0.4216, top tier for this dataset); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 3 job-posting-level and 0 certification-level matches (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Competency appears regularly in DE role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
